recentTweets.text:
RT @HouseDemocrats: Trump has raked in $2.2 BILLION since returning to the White House while Americans struggle to afford food and gas. 

I…

The cost of EVERYTHING is up because of Trump and Republicans.

It’s time to give Californians what they want: lower costs NOW. https://t.co/GDeN2jLaNy

The affordability crisis is crushing working families. 

Yet this week, House Republicans are trying to jam through a budget that does NOTHING to bring down the costs that the American people face.

RT @HouseDemocrats: Republicans created a cost of living crisis, and now, they're refusing to do anything to fix it.

Democrats are ready t…

Gas prices are soaring again after Trump restarted his failing war with Iran.  

Why won’t the President focus on bringing down costs instead of doubling down on a war the American people don’t want?

In just a week, Trump’s ICE has killed TWO PEOPLE in Houston and Maine during immigration enforcement operations.

ICE is out of control and putting people in danger. 

ENOUGH. We need accountability and reforms now.

The Randolph-Sheppard Program gives blind individuals freedom, dignity and financial independence to build their lives.

My own grandfather benefited from this incredible program for years, and I’m proud to continue supporting it today. https://t.co/hCAN16vz2C

Thousands of our neighbors in the Inland Empire are losing their healthcare coverage because of the Big Ugly Bill.

Trump and Republicans are NOT prioritizing the needs of working families. https://t.co/EmssgAXlHG

EVERYTHING is more expensive under the Trump Economy.

Trump promised a “Golden Age”

He lied.

One year ago, Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill kicked 300,000 Californians off their CalFresh benefits.

I joined the Family Service Association of Redlands on their monthly food distribution day to highlight how many Inland Empire families are now going hungry because of these cuts. https://t.co/AfYSvH65sx

Americans are spending MORE at the grocery store, the gas pump and the doctor's office because of Republicans’ failing economic policies.

House Democrats will continue fighting to lower costs for working families.
🚨 REMINDER: nearly 50,000 people in the Inland Empire will lose their healthcare coverage thanks to Trump’s and Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill.  All to give a tax cut to billionaires.

Happy Independence Day! For 250 years, the United States of America has been the beacon of freedom, democracy and the promise of a better tomorrow. 

Have a wonderful Fourth of July! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/ovaiWrEKMk

One year of Trump and Republicans’ Big Ugly Law:

🚫🏥8+ million Americans kicked off their healthcare
🚫🍎4+ million hungry families lost their food assistance 

And it’s only going to get worse.

🚨Reminder! The deadline to apply for a Fall Internship in my D.C. and San Bernardino offices is this Sunday, July 5.

For more information and to apply, visit https://t.co/qNneuU6TPK https://t.co/6IlgGq5mSc

Nearly one year after Trump and Republicans passed their Big Ugly Law, Americans are sicker, hungrier and poorer. 

And billionaires and big corporations are richer.
RT @HouseDemocrats: Trump and Republicans may always put billionaires first, but House Democrats will always put the American people first.…

It was great to visit with Sasha Hamilton, a high school student from San Bernardino and the winner of my district’s Congressional Art competition this year.

Her piece, “Between Dust and Promise,” will be displayed in the U.S. Capitol Building for one year. Congrats Sasha! https://t.co/sV0qefodbY

🚨The Supreme Court just affirmed what the Constitution says: if you’re born in America, then you’re an American citizen. 

Donald Trump can’t change that.

Happy Immigrant Heritage Month!

From shaping our culture to contributing to our economy, immigrants make this country great. I’ll keep fighting back against extremists’ attacks on our immigrant neighbors and work to protect the American Dream. https://t.co/cjt6s2m3iI

The Supreme Court just rejected Trump’s undemocratic attempt to limit mail-in ballots and suppress voters. 

This ruling is a huge win for the voting rights of the millions of Californians who vote by mail to make their voices heard.

RT @HouseDemocrats: Trump and Republicans know they will continue losing. 

That's why they are attacking free and fair elections. 

House…

Eleven years ago today, the landmark Obergefell v. Hodges Supreme Court decision affirmed marriage equality for everyone in this country.

I stand with the LGBTQI+ community and will always fight back against extremists’ attempts to undo this historic progress.

Trump and Republicans are responsible for high inflation and rising costs at the pump.

The American people are paying the price for Trump's recklessness.

https://t.co/rEfFW082c6

Donald Trump is holding a bill hostage that would lower housing costs.

Why? He wants to first pass legislation that would suppress voters so he can hold onto power.

This man does not care about the American people, he only cares about himself. https://t.co/yab9i3KMJ3

Four years ago, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, ending the constitutional right to abortion and devastating reproductive freedom.

House Democrats will keep fighting to protect reproductive rights from extremists who want to take this country backward.

🚨The House just passed bipartisan legislation to expand access to affordable housing in this country. 

I’m proud to have voted yes on this commonsense policy and I look forward to seeing the many ways it benefits hardworking California families.

Less than half of Americans say they can afford healthcare.

It’s only going to get worse once the cuts in Trump’s and Republicans’ Big Ugly Law fully kick in.

Costs will skyrocket, people will get sicker and hospital waiting rooms will fill up.

https://t.co/tN0l3NMgd3

Over 50 days ago, extremists on the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act.

I joined civil rights and community leaders in San Bernardino to highlight the importance of protecting voting rights and fair representation from attacks by the far-right. https://t.co/4SOqsIXngs
Happy Father’s Day to all of the dads, grandpas and father figures in the Inland Empire and around the country! Wishing everyone a great day spent with loved ones. https://t.co/VCwhHKPRF4

Happy Juneteenth!

Today, we are reminded of the progress we have made and the work that lies ahead in our ongoing quest for justice, equality and freedom for all. https://t.co/gb9tQhFEOO

I joined @RepJudyChu and @RepJimmyGomez to demand DHS Secretary Mullin immediately investigate reports of retaliation against detainees at the Adelanto ICE Facility for their hunger strike protesting unsafe conditions and for meeting with us during an oversight visit. https://t.co/hA8q2wb1uM
https://t.co/XWRtaiBRSb

$70 billion for ICE.

$0 to bring down costs for working families.

Republicans’ priorities do not lie with the American people.

‘I love the inflation’

That was Trump’s response when asked about the skyrocketing costs crushing American families.

The President does not care about working people.

I am heartbroken by the loss of eight U.S. Air Force crew members in an aircraft crash at Edwards Air Force Base in California.

My prayers are with their loved ones as they mourn this devastating tragedy.

https://t.co/eYdZZpkaXz
RT @HouseDemocrats: Statement from Chairman Aguilar on the 14th Anniversary of the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals Program. https://…

Throughout my time in Congress, I’ve fought to make life better for the brave men and women who served our country and ensure that they get the care and benefits they need. I’ll never stop working to deliver for veterans and uphold our promise to them.

https://t.co/BVQVWrR7IM https://t.co/jCesk2qZtc

It’s been over 100 days since the start of Trump’s war with Iran.

Costs are up. 13 servicemembers have lost their lives. And the President still has no clear plan or off ramp for this conflict.

While Republicans cut your health care to give tax breaks to billionaires and let ICE brutalize American communities, House Democrats are working to lower your costs and hold the Trump administration accountable.

We will never stop fighting for working families.
I’ve loved baseball since I was a kid. It was great to sit down with @the535news to talk about what tonight’s Congressional Baseball Game means to me!

RT @HouseDemocrats: House Democrats take to the field today! 

Meet the players in tonight’s Congressional Baseball game. https://t.co/7Mrh…

Excited to represent the Inland Empire at tonight’s Congressional Baseball Game!

Go Democrats⚾💪

Tune in live here: https://t.co/VgTZpBYnk3 https://t.co/jNO7Wb8ny4

Families in the Inland Empire and across the country are paying more for gas, groceries, housing and utilities under Trump and Republicans.

And Republicans are doing nothing about it.

Instead of lowering the costs of health care or groceries, House Republicans want to give ICE another $70 BILLION to continue their chaos without any reforms or guardrails. 

I voted NO on the reckless Republican budget bill.

Trump says there’s no money for healthcare.

But apparently there are billions of dollars for ICE and his costly war with Iran.

The President does not care about working people.

Your tax dollars should make your life safer and more affordable.

But instead of lowering costs for working families, Republicans’ budget bill gives ICE another $70 billion to continue brutalizing our communities without any accountability or oversight.
RT @HouseDemocrats: Americans are ready to put an end to the Trump and Republican corruption, and Democrats are stepping in. https://t.co/F…

Attention college students or recent graduates interested in Congress and public service🚨

Applications for Fall 2026 Internships in my D.C. and San Bernardino offices are now open!

For more information and to apply, visit https://t.co/qNneuU6TPK https://t.co/veYQnjGnT0

Trump promised to lower costs on “day one” and said there would be “no new wars.”  

More than 500 days into his second term, the only thing Trump has delivered are broken promises.

The American people want lower grocery and gas prices.

Not a costly war with Iran.

House Democrats just passed our War Powers Resolution to put a stop to Trump’s reckless and costly war with Iran with bipartisan support.

Donald Trump must end his war NOW.

Congratulations to the University of Redlands softball team on winning its first-ever NCAA Division III National Championship! 

As a proud alum, I couldn't be more excited to see the Bulldogs make history. You've made the Inland Empire proud. 🥎🔥 #GoDawgs

Today, the House will vote on Democrats’ War Powers Resolution to end Trump’s war with Iran.

Republicans cowardly canceled votes last week because they knew it would pass.

House Democrats will not back down.

The homophobic comment from Rep. Andy Ogles is disgusting and un-American. 

The LGBTQI+ community will always have a place in America. Rep. Andy Ogles’ hatred and bigotry do not.

I heard from detainees at the Adelanto ICE detention center about the facility’s dangerous, unsanitary and inhumane conditions. 

Democrats won’t give ICE another cent until their chaos and brutality are reined in and real reforms are in place. https://t.co/PzK9rcTKQt

It’s Election Day, California! Head to the ballot box and make your voice heard. 🗳️

Find your polling station here: https://t.co/Y76e3O8P3g

It was great to join @RepThompson last week at UC Davis for a town hall!

We talked to students about how House Democrats are fighting to make college more affordable and accessible for young people so they can build brighter futures. https://t.co/v6GgRl8Pda
RT @EqualityCaucus: House Democratic Caucus Chair @RepPeteAguilar: https://t.co/UP0S7wcv6R
Happy Pride Month! I proudly stand with the LGBTQI+ community and will keep fighting to protect our nation’s equality and work toward a more inclusive future. https://t.co/qQbqwSZBqk

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

Donald Trump must end his war NOW.

As a proud alum, I couldn't be more excited to see the Bulldogs make history. You've made the Inland Empire proud. 🥎🔥 #GoDawgs

Today, the House will vote on Democrats’ War Powers Resolution to end Trump’s war with Iran.

Republicans cowardly canceled votes last week because they knew it would pass.

House Democrats will not back down.

The homophobic comment from Rep. Andy Ogles is disgusting and un-American. 

The LGBTQI+ community will always have a place in America. Rep. Andy Ogles’ hatred and bigotry do not.

Democrats won’t give ICE another cent until their chaos and brutality are reined in and real reforms are in place. https://t.co/PzK9rcTKQt

Cuts to CalFresh made by Trump and Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill kick in today, threatening food assistance benefits for hundreds of thousands of Californians.

People go hungry while billionaires get richer.

https://t.co/AvxwWPNa9Y

Rising gas prices mean people have less to spend on snacks and drinks during their daily convenience store runs.

I visited the Rocket convenience store in Redlands to learn about their business and how higher costs have impacted drivers and shoppers. https://t.co/IXW2wEUagl

Congratulations to Shrey Parikh from Rancho Cucamonga on his record-breaking victory at this year’s Scripps National Spelling Bee🎉 

Shrey, your smarts, hard work and determination have truly made the Inland Empire proud!

https://t.co/hZXDAEd8Ma

The prices of gas, groceries, electricity and more are skyrocketing thanks to inflation and Trump’s war with Iran.

The President is asleep at the wheel while working Americans struggle to get by.

🚨REMINDER🚨

Everything is more expensive right now thanks to Donald Trump and Republicans.
Donald Trump is the most corrupt president in United States history. https://t.co/NJrlUdDnPa

While costs soar, Trump does nothing. 

And the American people are sick of it.

https://t.co/WODWlJA8jy
On Memorial Day, we honor and remember the bravery and courage of our nation’s fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. https://t.co/4pKxrjCIKY

I am proud to deliver over $1 million for the City of San Bernardino to strengthen our emergency water and infrastructure to reduce the impact of power outages.

This will make it easier for first responders to keep people safe, especially during disasters like wildfires. https://t.co/N91BM560bh

RT @HouseDemocrats: Republicans should be doing everything that they can to lower costs like they promised. 

If they don’t, Democrats will…

Inland Empire families are feeling the pain of cuts to healthcare and food assistance in Republicans’ Big Ugly Law and Trump’s war with Iran.

I won’t stand for these reckless policies and neither will organizations like Inland SoCal United Way. https://t.co/cFUEIeKIwD

We need an urgent response to this country’s affordable housing crisis.

That’s why I was proud to help pass bipartisan legislation to build more homes and lower costs for families in California and across the nation.

https://t.co/czRkkijAUR

Former Congressman Barney Frank was a trailblazer and fierce advocate for the LGBTQ+ community and the people of Massachusetts.

Our country is a better place because of his commitment to public service, justice and equality. He will be missed.

Whether it’s a car accident or a wildfire, it’s crucial that our police and fire departments have the resources they need to keep us safe.

I’m proud to deliver over $1 million for @CityOfRC to improve emergency response, public safety and collaboration between first responders. https://t.co/lYZH64vznS
Donald Trump is responsible for skyrocketing gas prices. https://t.co/ZvZFgT4I9Y

I am heartbroken by the news of the shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego and I am praying for those affected.

Islamophobia has no place in this country. We must recommit to rooting out all forms of hatred and violence.

Republicans just voted to spend $152 million of YOUR taxpayer dollars to reopen Alcatraz. 

I wish I was joking. https://t.co/uqmATEKjNQ

Families–especially children–should not be going hungry in the wealthiest nation on earth.

But thanks to Trump and Republicans’ Big Ugly Law, this is the reality for millions of Americans.

https://t.co/cza8usuQzi

I grilled Housing Secretary Scott Turner about the Trump administration’s new housing policies that are displacing American citizens from their homes—including families and children. https://t.co/PkXDFOiYmW

Hardworking Californians are already struggling to afford groceries, healthcare and utilities, and now it’s even more expensive to fill up your gas tank thanks to Trump’s war with Iran.

Working people are paying the price for Trump’s reckless war of choice.
Gas prices in San Bernardino today thanks to Trump. https://t.co/WMBOxXSGuf
Trump just admitted what we’ve known all along: he doesn’t care how his war with Iran is hurting working Americans’ wallets.

Housing is already too expensive for too many families, and Trump’s budget will only make it worse by making huge cuts to affordable housing and rental assistance.

WATCH @ 4 PM as @AppropsDems demand answers and hold the Trump administration accountable: https://t.co/92G8xYo45X

🚨BREAKING: The Pentagon just admitted that Trump’s war with Iran has cost $29 BILLION in taxpayer dollars.

Yet the Trump administration can’t find a single cent to lower your costs or make healthcare affordable. https://t.co/EVcZVleu04

Many people in the Inland Empire are frustrated with mailbox theft and vandalism.

That’s why I pushed for bipartisan changes in a funding bill urging USPS to handle issues faster and support legislation to make it safer for mail carriers to do their jobs. https://t.co/SdAB9nssbp
RT @HouseDemocrats: Trump would rather spend billions on a new ballroom and a costly war than tackle the cost of living crisis he created.…

Inflation just hit its highest point in THREE YEARS because of Trump’s war with Iran.

Everything is more expensive thanks to Republicans.

Costs are skyrocketing and people across the country are struggling to make ends meet.

Yet instead of funding healthcare and food assistance, Republicans want to spend $1 BILLION in taxpayer dollars on Trump’s ballroom.

Make it make sense.
RT @HouseDemocrats: House Democrats will always fight for the American people. https://t.co/ifWzpzdUbG
Happy Mother’s Day to all of the moms, grandmas and caregivers in the Inland Empire and around the country! Thank you for all of your love, guidance and strength https://t.co/SDQu6hy2LN
RT @RepDanGoldman: Today, Caucus Chairman @RepPeteAguilar joined me for my weekly oversight visit of 26 Federal Plaza to see firsthand why…

Each year, Inland Empire students submit their art for the annual Congressional Art Competition. I was proud to spend time with this year’s winners and honor them for their creativity, passion and talent. https://t.co/gkiRXAHgkx

Today’s Virginia Supreme Court ruling is a blatant attempt to silence millions of Virginia voters who stood up to Trump.

Republicans know they’ll lose in November so they’re rigging elections and suppressing voters.

This isn’t over. Democrats won’t stop fighting back.

Gas prices are up in all 50 states thanks to Trump’s war with Iran.

Yet while working people pay more at the gas pump, Trump is digging us deeper into a costly overseas conflict.

https://t.co/We0SO0EcKk

All animals in the Inland Empire deserve the proper care and attention they need to be healthy and happy.

I’m excited to deliver $2 million for San Bernardino County to build an animal shelter in Bloomington to give more pets homes and improve public safety. https://t.co/sP7nHJTbzO

The numbers don’t lie: Trump’s disapproval rating is at a record high because the American people are tired of his horrible policies that are making their lives more expensive.

https://t.co/sLobEON4RY

Inland Empire families need a safe and fun place to spend time outdoors and enjoy our beautiful state. 

That’s why I am proud to deliver $1 million to @CityofRedlands to upgrade amenities at Texonia Park, making it safer and more accessible for everyone. https://t.co/egujo1xOoS
